title: Section 391
content: (1) Any power to make bye-laws conferred by this Act is conferred subject to the condition of the bye-laws being made after previous publication and in the case of such bye-laws being made by the Council of their not taking effect until they have been approved by the Government and published in the Official Gazette. (2) The Government in approving a bye-law may make any change therein which appears to it to be necessary. (3) The Government may, after previous publication of its intention, cancel any bye-law which it has approved, and thereupon the bye-law shall cease to have effect.
